brand_identity: The Earnalism - A luxury online bookstore and thoughtful reading destination. Premium, literary, calm, elegant, and trustworthy.

headings.style: Elegant, tight tracking for large sizes, wide for small overlines. Font weights 300 (Light) and 600 (SemiBold).

body.style: Clean, highly readable, geometric but soft. Regular 400 and Medium 500.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-12, p-16, p-24. High-end editorial feel.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Asymmetrical usage. Grid-cols-12. Large hero, varied category card sizes.
spacing_and_layout.container_borders: 1px solid border_subtle with p-8 internal padding. Subtle paper texture.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#4A1C27] text-[#FDFCF8] hover:bg-[#3A141D]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#C5A059] text-[#4A1C27] hover:bg-[#C5A059]/10. Fully rounded-full or rounded-sm based on feel.
components.cards: Surface Ivory, subtle drop-shadow-sm, rounded-2xl or rounded-xl. Hover state: slight -translate-y-1, increased soft shadow.
components.header: Crystal glassmorphism: bg-[#F4EFEA]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5DCD3]/50. Must include logo, nav links, and CTA.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. bg-transparent border-b border-[#2C2C2C]/20 focus:border-[#4A1C27]. No harsh outlines. rounded-none for a more editorial look or rounded-md.
components.filters: Minimalist tabs/pills. active: bg-[#4A1C27] text-white, inactive: text-[#2C2C2C]/60 hover:text-[#2C2C2C]

hero_library.description: Warm lit luxury library interior for Hero background

category_spirituality.description: Calm minimal abstract warm texture - golden light (Spirituality)

blog_1.description: Luxury fountain pen on writing desk

instructions_to_main_agent.css_variables: Add these to index.css :root { --brand-burgundy: #4A1C27; --brand-beige: #F4EFEA; --brand-ivory: #FDFCF8; --brand-gold: #C5A059; --brand-charcoal: #2C2C2C; --brand-border: #E5DCD3; }. Use these via Tailwind classes like bg-[var(--brand-burgundy)].
instructions_to_main_agent.background_texture: Use a subtle SVG noise filter or a repeating paper texture on the main body background to give the 'subtle paper texture' requested.

page_sections.Home: Hero with 'hero_library' as bg with dark overlay, Featured Categories (bento grid with the 5 category images), Featured Book Spotlight (use 'book_cover_placeholder' + 'Brownies to Break-Even'), Why Us (3 cards), Founder Note (using 'founder_ambient'), Newsletter, Footer.
page_sections.Shop: Grid with Sidebar/Top filters for categories, Book cards using 'book_cover_placeholder' if no dynamic image.
page_sections.Product_Detail: Large split-screen or generous padding format. Left: Book cover sticky. Right: Details, Format Toggle (Paperback/Ebook), Add to Cart.
page_sections.Blog_List: Magazine style. Large featured article, grid of smaller articles using blog_1, 2, 3 images.
page_sections.Blog_Article: Narrow column (max-w-prose), drop caps, elegant pull-quotes with gold left-border, large serif headers.
page_sections.About: Multi-section narrative. Founder image, history, mission.
page_sections.Publishing_Services: Editorial layout, services list, elegant request form with Shadcn.
page_sections.Contact: Minimal form with Ivory surface card.
page_sections.Admin: Strict Grid hierarchy. Clean Shadcn components. Avoid large abstract images, focus on data density.

instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All buttons, links, form inputs must have data-testid. E.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button'.
